name: Risk management
description: Controls ensuring that hazards associated with equipment use, failure modes, environmental conditions, and process interactions are identified, evaluated, and mitigated in alignment with risk-based principles consistent with ISO 14971.
scaling_rules: high_risk -> expanded_mitigation_and_review; complex_equipment -> deeper_failure_mode_analysis; critical_process -> increased_sampling_and_challenge_rigor; high_automation -> software_failure_modes_considered
internal_notes: Provides a unified risk framework across all equipment types. Drives sampling plans, challenge rigor, acceptance criteria, and requalification frequency.
